response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptionally accomplished full-stack engineer with 15+ years of software development experience, this role requires native-level Japanese proficiency—a stated requirement he completely lacks—and specialized expertise in embedded networking security that is entirely absent from his resume. His career has evolved toward web and application development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than the embedded systems, security infrastructure, and networking protocols this position demands. The combination of missing the critical language requirement and lacking domain-specific expertise in security technologies, networking protocols, and Linux kernel work makes this a poor fit despite his general technical excellence.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across 15+ years with proven ability to work on complex distributed systems and lead technical initiatives
Demonstrates systems-thinking through infrastructure work: CI/CD setup, GitLab administration, Docker containerization, and development environment building
Some embedded systems background from robotic arm development at Altom and proven track record of rapidly acquiring new technical domains
concerns: Missing Japanese language proficiency despite being a stated required qualification; resume lists only English (fluent), Romanian (fluent), and German (basic)
No demonstrated expertise in required security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption, key exchange) or authentication systems; background is application and web-focused
Career trajectory over past 5 years diverged from embedded networking; recent roles emphasize full-stack web/cloud (Node.js, TypeScript, AWS); C experience is from 2014-2015 and not recent

key_factors.factor: No security or embedded networking domain expertise
Demonstrated C and embedded systems experience (dated)
